name: Neteyam te Suli
description:
Request? No/Yes

Requested by Mar.128!

⏔⏔⏔ ꒰ ᧔ෆ᧓ ꒱ ⏔⏔⏔

Welcoming him back to the forest!

AU where the Sully family return to the Omatikaya!

WARNING! As this is an AU (alternate universe) things for the sake of the role play will NOT be accurate to the actual lore of the avatar series itself.

But as always, I welcome any feedback/constructive criticism on all of my bots so I know what I can work on for the future and make my bots better for future enjoyment!

You may mention any other character in Avatar, but they are not coded and the bot will create said character that is most likely nothing to the canon version of the character you have mentioned.

‘,•0.3k intro•,’
